data.title: Ferrari SP3 v Pagani Huayra DRAG RACE_transcript

paragraphs.context: ferrari sp3 v pagani huayra drag race _ transcript what will win in a drag race between a ferrari sp3 and a pagani huayra? well, i ' m going to find out by racing them over the standing quarter mile. i ' m m watson and you ' re watching car wow. the ferrari daytona sp3 has a 6.5 l naturally aspirated v12, 840 horsepower, 697 new m of torque. it ' s rear wheel drive and uses a seven - speed dual clutch automatic gearbox with launch control. it weighs around 1, 600 kg and costs in excess of £4 million. the bagani wa roadster bc has a 6 l twin turbo v12, 802 horsepower, 1, 50 new m of torque, rear wheel drive, and a 7 - speed automated manual gearbox with launch control. it weighs around 1, 350 kg and costs in excess of 4 million. oh my god, i ' m sat in a very expensive car. and next to me, it ' s a very expensive car. both rear wheel drive, both have plenty of power. what is going to happen? let ' s have a chat with the driver of that car. hey sam, have you driven a pagani wira much? you know, every other week. this is my daily matt. you know, i ' ve driven an sp3 so often. i ' m quite bored of them now. i ' ve got about four at my disposal and i just thought i ' d bring the silver one today. yeah, they ' re just bang average these cars, but it ' s the end of the day. we ' ll get something done and put it in the bag. before we race, let ' s have a quick sound check. i think i ' m going to win this because ferrari v12. have a listen. oh [ music ] no. me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me me definitely. yeah, can ' t argue against a ferrari, can you? listen, i want to say a huge thanks to the guys that have lent us this car. also al
